msg: Follow-up from MPI-283: extend-from-last-frame should capture the exact last frame via frameSink (frame-accurate), not a native-seek drift. Color is already correct (draws native <video>, not WebCodecs canvas).

summary: Frame-accurate last-frame capture. Added surface.lastFrameIndex(trimOut)+captureFrameCanvas(idx) (frameStep law + frameSink), viewer.captureLastFrameAccurate() wrapper, _captureLastFrameMedia tries it first, native captureSnapshot fallback. Testable via same Extend flow as MPI-281.
User-verified: frame-accurate last-frame capture wired (sink + native fallback). T2V->I2V color shift out of scope. Committed 4e896a31.
